_meta.artifact: NARS-JARVIS v1 — Semantic Ingestion Validation Corpus
_meta.status: foundational architectural artifact (NOT a code unit-test suite)
_meta.purpose: Ground-truth fixtures to TUNE the L0/L1/L2 ingestion-gate thresholds and VERIFY its fail-closed decisions. The pipeline is graded against this corpus.
_meta.validates_on: the typed Claim AST (the `claim` field), NOT the compiled Narsese string. L0 inspects claims BEFORE to_narsese(); the `narsese` field is the compiled form, shown for human readability and for L1's back-render check.

gate_semantics.L0: Zero-latency deterministic STRUCTURE gate over Claim objects. REJECT (absolute, non-overridable): non-whitelisted shape, non-taxonomic relation verb (out-of-scope causal/action), fused multi-concept atom. ACCEPT (fast path): structurally sound AND all content atoms trace to a source token via an inflectional-only stemmer. DEFER: structurally sound but an atom is untraceable -> hand to L1.
gate_semantics.L1: Model-free semantic bridge. Pure-code back-render + cosine(original, back-render) via the resident nomic embedder. High -> accept; low -> reject; middle -> L2. L1/L2 rejects ARE human-overridable.
gate_semantics.L2: Single-token GBNF arbiter (SAME|DIFF, temp 0, hard timeout, default DIFF) for the ambiguous middle band.

schema.claim: the typed claim the translator produces (GBNF schema: RelationClaim/PropertyClaim/Negated*). THIS is what L0 validates.
schema.narsese: the compiled term to_narsese() would emit from `claim` (for L1 / human readability)
schema.decided_by: the layer that makes the final call. L0 cases: L0 returns ACCEPT/REJECT. L1 cases: L0 must return DEFER, L1 decides.
schema.overridable: true for probabilistic (L1/L2) rejects; false for L0 structural rejects; null for accepts
schema.source: observed = produced by the live Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct + compiler in-session; constructed = hand-authored fixture to be re-verified against the live model

_meta.stemmer_boundary: Inflectional ONLY (plural -s/-es/-ies, verb -ed/-ing/-er/-est/-ly). Derivational stripping (-ity/-ation/-ize/-ment, and prefixes like un-) FORBIDDEN. Irregular/derivational forms intentionally fall through to L1.
corrections_log: fused-02/fused-04: changed from =/> and ==> copulas to the product-relation form (<(a * b) --> verb>) the GBNF grammar can actually emit; implication copulas are unreachable via the learn pipeline.

exact-04: changed 'unsafe for me' -> 'not safe'. The un- prefix is derivational; atom 'safe' only traces deterministically when 'safe' is literally present. The 'unsafe' variant is an L1 case, not L0.
infl-04: changed to a negated taxonomy with a regular plural (Dogs/reptiles) so it exercises the stemmer; the prior verb-conjugation example traced exactly and tested nothing.

cases.note: Taxonomic verb; atoms verbatim in source -> L0 accept.
Negated property (freq 0); atom 'safe' literally present (explicit 'not'), so it traces at L0. The 'unsafe' phrasing is an L1 case (un- is derivational).
Singular atoms vs plural source; stemmer trace ducks->duck, birds->bird must fast-accept.
Synonym car->automobile; 'automobile' is NOT a source token, so L0 must DEFER. L1 cosine accepts.
dangerous->unsafe; 'unsafe' untraceable -> L0 DEFER; L1 accepts on high cosine.
physician->doctor; taxonomic verb so structurally fine, but 'doctor' untraceable -> L0 DEFER; L1 accepts.
Injected concept 'blue' untraceable -> L0 DEFER; L1 rejects (low cosine). Human may override.
Object hallucinated; taxonomic verb passes structure, 'rocket' untraceable -> DEFER -> L1 reject.
'expensive' neither present nor a synonym of 'heavy' -> DEFER -> L1 reject.
Non-taxonomic verb 'makes' (causal) AND fused object 'me alert'. Structural reject; not overridable. Recovery = reframe.
Corrected from <studying =/> knowledge> (unreachable). Non-taxonomic verb 'causes' -> product relation -> structural reject.
Non-taxonomic verb + fused atom 'ground wet'; structural reject.

cases.english: If it rains, the match is cancelled.
cases.note: Corrected from <rain ==> [cancelled]> (unreachable). Conditional collapses; non-taxonomic verb 'cancels' -> product relation -> structural reject.
